metrics.command_line: export PYTHON_EGG_CACHE=`pwd` &&   (macs2 callpeak   -t '/mnt/disks/pulsar_staging/270/inputs/dataset_63049be9-076d-4f46-83ac-20793f09ed92.dat'  --name forward_and_reverse    --format BAMPE   --gsize '2913022398'      --SPMR     --call-summits  --keep-dup '1'  --d-min 20 --buffer-size 100000  --bdg  --qvalue '0.05'  --mfold '5' '50'  --bw '300'  2>&1 > macs2_stderr) && cp forward_and_reverse_peaks.xls '/mnt/disks/pulsar_staging/270/working/dataset_b968df18-e3fc-4b66-ab3c-6e62a59afa90.dat'   && ( count=`ls -1 forward_and_reverse* 2>/dev/null | wc -l`; if [ $count != 0 ]; then mkdir '/mnt/disks/pulsar_staging/270/working/dataset_29aa1e9d-5846-43d6-ac03-38d1551ca2dd_files' && cp -r forward_and_reverse* '/mnt/disks/pulsar_staging/270/working/dataset_29aa1e9d-5846-43d6-ac03-38d1551ca2dd_files' && python '/mnt/disks/pulsar_staging/270/tool_files/dir2html.py' '/mnt/disks/pulsar_staging/270/working/dataset_29aa1e9d-5846-43d6-ac03-38d1551ca2dd_files' macs2_stderr > '/mnt/disks/pulsar_staging/270/working/dataset_29aa1e9d-5846-43d6-ac03-38d1551ca2dd.dat'; fi; ) && exit_code_for_galaxy=$? && cat macs2_stderr 2>&1 && (exit $exit_code_for_galaxy)

params.advanced_options: {"broad_options": {"__current_case__": 1, "broad_options_selector": "nobroad", "call_summits": true}, "buffer_size": "100000", "d_min": "20", "keep_dup_options": {"__current_case__": 1, "keep_dup_options_selector": "1"}, "llocal": null, "nolambda": false, "ratio": null, "slocal": null, "spmr": true, "to_large": false}
